_comment: Copy to cluster-config.json and edit. The setup script reads this on every host. All fields are optional — if missing, the script falls back to discovery (mDNS) then prompt.

controller._comment: Where MeshCentral lives. If omitted, script auto-discovers via mDNS / DNS / scan / prompt.

host._comment: Per-host overrides. If omitted, script auto-derives.

vms._comment: VM fleet on this host. Names are name_prefix + suffix; for count=2 the default suffixes are 'a','b'. Override suffixes for count > 2.

network._comment: NAT switch for VMs. Picks first available /24 from this list to avoid host network collisions.

wifi._comment: Optional — only if the script should add a WiFi profile. NEVER store the password in this JSON. Choose one secure source below; the rest must stay null. If WiFi is already configured on the host, leave the whole block as null.
wifi._password_warning: If you set 'password' here, the script will refuse to run unless 'allow_plaintext_password' is also set true. Prefer credential_manager_target.
